build.buildCommand: rm -rf node_modules 2>/dev/null || true && npm ci && npm run build && mkdir -p public/governance-docs public/regulation-docs/files public/documents && cp -r database/seeders/assets/* public/governance-docs/ && cp -r database/seeders/assets/regulations/* public/regulation-docs/files/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r database/seeders/assets/documents/* public/documents/ 2>/dev/null || true
